info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

post.description: Create a new table in the specified base with customizable fields, views, and initial records. Default configurations will be applied if not specified.

dbTableName.description: Table name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, start with letter, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case insensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db table name in the base.

icon.description: The emoji icon string of the table.

type.description: The field types supported by teable.

unique.description: Whether this field is not unique.

notNull.description: Whether this field is not null.

dbFieldName.description: Field(column) name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case sensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db field name in the table.

isLookup.description: Whether this field is lookup field. witch means cellValue and [fieldType] is looked up from the linked table.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

linkFieldId.description: The id of Linked record field to use for lookup

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

filter.description: Filter to apply when resolving conditional lookup values.

fieldId.description: The field in the foreign table used to order lookup records.

order.description: Ordering direction to apply to the sorted field.

sort.description: Optional sort configuration applied before aggregating lookup values.

limit.description: Maximum number of matching records to include in the lookup result.

lookupOptions.description: The lookup options for field, you need to configure it when isLookup attribute is true or field type is rollup.

timeZone.description: The time zone that should be used to format dates

formatting.description: Different cell value types are determined based on the results of expression parsing

type.description: can display as url, email or phone in string field with a button to perform the corresponding action, start a phone call, send an email, or open a link in a new tab
can display as bar or ring in number field with single cellValue value

showValue.description: whether to displays the specific value on the graph

maxValue.description: the value that represents a 100% maximum value, it does not represent a hard limit on the value

type.description: can display as bar or line in number field with multiple cellValue value

showAs.description: According to the results of expression parsing to determine different visual effects, where strings, numbers will provide customized "show as"

timeZone.description: The time zone that should be used to format dates

formatting.description: Different cell value types are determined based on the results of expression parsing

maxValue.description: the value that represents a 100% maximum value, it does not represent a hard limit on the value

showAs.description: According to the results of expression parsing to determine different visual effects, where strings, numbers will provide customized "show as"

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

expression.description: The formula including fields referenced by their IDs. For example, LEFT(4, {Birthday}) input will be returned as LEFT(4, {fldXXX}) via API.

timeZone.description: The time zone that should be used to format dates

formatting.description: Different cell value types are determined based on the results of expression parsing

type.description: can display as url, email or phone in string field with a button to perform the corresponding action, start a phone call, send an email, or open a link in a new tab
can display as bar or ring in number field with single cellValue value

showValue.description: whether to displays the specific value on the graph

maxValue.description: the value that represents a 100% maximum value, it does not represent a hard limit on the value

type.description: can display as bar or line in number field with multiple cellValue value

showAs.description: According to the results of expression parsing to determine different visual effects, where strings, numbers will provide customized "show as"

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

relationship.description: describe the relationship from this table to the foreign table

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

isOneWay.description: whether the field is a one-way link, when true, it will not generate a symmetric field, it is generally has better performance

fkHostTableName.description: the table name for storing keys, in many-to-many relationships, keys are stored in a separate intermediate table; in other relationships, keys are stored on one side as needed

selfKeyName.description: the name of the field that stores the current table primary key

foreignKeyName.description: The name of the field that stores the foreign table primary key

symmetricFieldId.description: the symmetric field in the foreign table, empty if the field is a one-way link

filterByViewId.description: the view id that limits the number of records in the link field

visibleFieldIds.description: the fields that will be displayed in the link field

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

date.description: the display formatting of the date. you can use the following presets: M/D/YYYY, D/M/YYYY, YYYY/MM/DD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM, MM-DD, YYYY, MM, DD

time.description: the display formatting of the time. you can use the following presets: HH:mm, hh:mm A, None

timeZone.description: The time zone that should be used to format dates

formatting.description: caveat: the formatting is just a formatter, it dose not effect the storing value of the record

defaultValue.description: Whether the new row is automatically filled with the current time, caveat: the defaultValue is just a flag, it dose not effect the storing value of the record

type.description: can display as url, email or phone in string field with a button to perform the corresponding action, start a phone call, send an email, or open a link in a new tab

showAs.description: Only be used in single line text field or formula / rollup field with cellValueType equals String and isMultipleCellValue is not true

shouldNotify.description: Notify users when their name is added to a cell

type.description: can display as url, email or phone in string field with a button to perform the corresponding action, start a phone call, send an email, or open a link in a new tab
can display as bar or ring in number field with single cellValue value

showValue.description: whether to displays the specific value on the graph

maxValue.description: the value that represents a 100% maximum value, it does not represent a hard limit on the value

type.description: can display as bar or line in number field with multiple cellValue value

showAs.description: According to the results of expression parsing to determine different visual effects, where strings, numbers will provide customized "show as"

formatting.description: Different cell value types are determined based on the results of expression parsing

options.description: The options of the field. The configuration of the field's options depend on the it's specific type.

prompt.description: The prompt to use for the AI operation, use {fieldId} to reference the field in the table, example: "Summarize the content of {fieldId} into 100 words"

aiConfig.description: The AI configuration of the field.

id.description: The id of the field that start with "fld", followed by exactly 16 alphanumeric characters `/^fld[\da-zA-Z]{16}$/`. It is sometimes useful to specify an id at creation time

viewId.description: You can only specify order in one view when create field

fields.description: The fields of the table. If it is empty, 3 fields include SingleLineText, Number, SingleSelect will and 3 empty records be generated by default.

rowHeight.description: The row height level of row in view

fieldNameDisplayLines.description: The field name display lines in view

frozenColumnCount.description: The frozen column count in view. Deprecated: this field will be removed in a future release and may no longer take effect.

frozenFieldId.description: Freeze to the right side of this field id in grid view

stackFieldId.description: The field id of the Kanban stack.

coverFieldId.description: The cover field id is a designated attachment field id, the contents of which appear at the top of each Kanban card.

isCoverFit.description: If true, cover images are resized to fit Kanban cards.

isFieldNameHidden.description: If true, hides field name in the Kanban cards.

isEmptyStackHidden.description: If true, hides empty stacks in the Kanban.

coverFieldId.description: The cover field id is a designated attachment field id, the contents of which appear at the top of each gallery card.

isCoverFit.description: If true, cover images are resized to fit gallery cards.

isFieldNameHidden.description: If true, hides field name in the gallery cards.

coverUrl.description: The cover url of the form

logoUrl.description: The logo url of the form

submitLabel.description: The submit button text of the form

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

order.description: Order is a floating number, column will sort by it in the view.

hidden.description: If column hidden in the view.

statisticFunc.description: Statistic function of the column in the view.

order.description: Order is a floating number, column will sort by it in the view.

visible.description: If column visible in the kanban view.

order.description: Order is a floating number, column will sort by it in the view.

visible.description: If column visible in the gallery view.

order.description: Order is a floating number, column will sort by it in the view.

visible.description: If column visible in the view.

order.description: Order is a floating number, column will sort by it in the view.

hidden.description: If column hidden in the view.

columnMeta.description: A mapping of view IDs to their corresponding column metadata.

views.description: The views of the table. If it is empty, a grid view will be generated by default.

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

records.description: The record data of the table. If it is empty, 3 empty records will be generated by default.

fieldKeyType.description: Define the key type of record.fields[key], You can click "systemInfo" in the field edit box to get fieldId or enter the table design screen with all the field details

dbTableName.description: Table name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, start with letter, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case insensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db table name in the base.

icon.description: The emoji icon string of the table.

name.description: The name of the field. can not be duplicated in the table.

type.description: The field types supported by teable.

timeZone.description: The time zone that should be used to format dates

options.description: The configuration options of the field. The structure of the field's options depend on the field's type.

persistedAsGeneratedColumn.description: Whether this formula field is persisted as a generated column in the database. When true, the field value is computed and stored as a database generated column.

hasOrderColumn.description: Whether this link field has an order column for maintaining insertion order. When true, the field uses a separate order column to preserve the order of linked records.

meta.description: The metadata of the field. The structure of the field's meta depend on the field's type. Currently formula and link fields have meta.

prompt.description: The prompt to use for the AI operation, use {fieldId} to reference the field in the table, example: "Summarize the content of {fieldId} into 100 words"

aiConfig.description: The AI configuration of the field.

isLookup.description: Whether this field is lookup field. witch means cellValue and [fieldType] is looked up from the linked table.

isConditionalLookup.description: Whether this lookup field applies a conditional filter when resolving linked records.

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

relationship.description: describe the relationship from this table to the foreign table

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

fkHostTableName.description: the table name for storing keys, in many-to-many relationships, keys are stored in a separate intermediate table; in other relationships, keys are stored on one side as needed

selfKeyName.description: the name of the field that stores the current table primary key

foreignKeyName.description: The name of the field that stores the foreign table primary key

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

linkFieldId.description: The id of Linked record field to use for lookup

baseId.description: the base id of the table that this field is linked to, only required for cross base link

foreignTableId.description: the table this field is linked to

lookupFieldId.description: the field in the foreign table that will be displayed as the current field

filter.description: Filter to apply when resolving conditional lookup values.

fieldId.description: The field in the foreign table used to order lookup records.

order.description: Ordering direction to apply to the sorted field.

sort.description: Optional sort configuration applied before aggregating lookup values.

limit.description: Maximum number of matching records to include in the lookup result.

notNull.description: Whether this field is not null.

unique.description: Whether this field is not unique.

isPrimary.description: Whether this field is primary field.

isComputed.description: Whether this field is computed field, you can not modify cellValue in computed field.

isPending.description: Whether this field's calculation is pending.

hasError.description: Whether This field has a configuration error. Check the fields referenced by this field's formula or configuration.

cellValueType.description: The cell value type of the field.

isMultipleCellValue.description: Whether this field has multiple cell value.

dbFieldType.description: The field type of database that cellValue really store.

dbFieldName.description: Field(column) name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case sensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db field name in the table.

recordRead.description: Field record read permission. When set to false, reading records is denied. When true or not set, reading records is allowed.

recordCreate.description: Field record create permission. When set to false, creating records is denied. When true or not set, creating records is allowed.

rowHeight.description: The row height level of row in view

fieldNameDisplayLines.description: The field name display lines in view

frozenColumnCount.description: The frozen column count in view. Deprecated: this field will be removed in a future release and may no longer take effect.

frozenFieldId.description: Freeze to the right side of this field id in grid view

stackFieldId.description: The field id of the Kanban stack.

coverFieldId.description: The cover field id is a designated attachment field id, the contents of which appear at the top of each Kanban card.

isCoverFit.description: If true, cover images are resized to fit Kanban cards.

isFieldNameHidden.description: If true, hides field name in the Kanban cards.

isEmptyStackHidden.description: If true, hides empty stacks in the Kanban.

coverFieldId.description: The cover field id is a designated attachment field id, the contents of which appear at the top of each gallery card.

isCoverFit.description: If true, cover images are resized to fit gallery cards.

isFieldNameHidden.description: If true, hides field name in the gallery cards.

coverUrl.description: The cover url of the form

logoUrl.description: The logo url of the form

submitLabel.description: The submit button text of the form

filter.description: A filter object for complex query conditions based on fields, operators, and values. Use our visual query builder at https://app.teable.ai/developer/tool/query-builder to build filters.

order.description: Order is a floating number, column will sort by it in the view.

hidden.description: If column hidden in the view.

statisticFunc.description: Statistic function of the column in the view.

order.description: Order is a floating number, column will sort by it in the view.

visible.description: If column visible in the kanban view.

order.description: Order is a floating number, column will sort by it in the view.

visible.description: If column visible in the gallery view.

order.description: Order is a floating number, column will sort by it in the view.

visible.description: If column visible in the view.

order.description: Order is a floating number, column will sort by it in the view.

hidden.description: If column hidden in the view.

columnMeta.description: A mapping of view IDs to their corresponding column metadata.

fields.description: Objects with a fields key mapping fieldId or field name to value for that field.

autoNumber.description: Auto number, a unique identifier for each record

createdTime.description: Created time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).

lastModifiedTime.description: Last modified time, date ISO string (new Date().toISOString).
The last modified time of the table.

defaultViewId.description: The default view id of the table.

schema.description: Complete table structure data and initial record data.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/table/ \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN' \
  --header 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data '{"name":"string","dbTableName":"string","description":"string","icon":"string","fields":[{"type":"singleSelect","name":"string","unique":true,"notNull":true,"dbFieldName":"string","isLookup":true,"isConditionalLookup":true,"description":"this is a summary","lookupOptions":{"foreignTableId":"string","lookupFieldId":"string","linkFieldId":"string","filter":{}},"options":{"expression":"countall({values})","timeZone":"string","formatting":null,"showAs":{"type":"url"}},"aiConfig":{"modelKey":"string","isAutoFill":true,"attachPrompt":"string","type":"extraction","sourceFieldId":"string"},"id":"fldxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx","order":{"viewId":"string","orderIndex":0}}],"views":[{"name":"string","type":"grid","description":"string","order":0,"options":{"rowHeight":"short","fieldNameDisplayLines":1,"frozenColumnCount":0,"frozenFieldId":"string"},"sort":{"sortObjs":[{"fieldId":"string","order":"asc"}],"manualSort":true},"filter":{},"group":[{"fieldId":"string","order":"asc"}],"isLocked":true,"shareId":"string","enableShare":true,"shareMeta":{"allowCopy":true,"includeHiddenField":true,"password":"string","includeRecords":true,"submit":{"allow":true,"requireLogin":true}},"columnMeta":{"property1":{"order":0,"width":0,"hidden":true,"statisticFunc":"count"},"property2":{"order":0,"width":0,"hidden":true,"statisticFunc":"count"}}}],"records":[{"fields":{"single line text":"text value"}}],"order":0,"fieldKeyType":"id"}'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

payload = "{\"name\":\"string\",\"dbTableName\":\"string\",\"description\":\"string\",\"icon\":\"string\",\"fields\":[{\"type\":\"singleSelect\",\"name\":\"string\",\"unique\":true,\"notNull\":true,\"dbFieldName\":\"string\",\"isLookup\":true,\"isConditionalLookup\":true,\"description\":\"this is a summary\",\"lookupOptions\":{\"foreignTableId\":\"string\",\"lookupFieldId\":\"string\",\"linkFieldId\":\"string\",\"filter\":{}},\"options\":{\"expression\":\"countall({values})\",\"timeZone\":\"string\",\"formatting\":null,\"showAs\":{\"type\":\"url\"}},\"aiConfig\":{\"modelKey\":\"string\",\"isAutoFill\":true,\"attachPrompt\":\"string\",\"type\":\"extraction\",\"sourceFieldId\":\"string\"},\"id\":\"fldxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx\",\"order\":{\"viewId\":\"string\",\"orderIndex\":0}}],\"views\":[{\"name\":\"string\",\"type\":\"grid\",\"description\":\"string\",\"order\":0,\"options\":{\"rowHeight\":\"short\",\"fieldNameDisplayLines\":1,\"frozenColumnCount\":0,\"frozenFieldId\":\"string\"},\"sort\":{\"sortObjs\":[{\"fieldId\":\"string\",\"order\":\"asc\"}],\"manualSort\":true},\"filter\":{},\"group\":[{\"fieldId\":\"string\",\"order\":\"asc\"}],\"isLocked\":true,\"shareId\":\"string\",\"enableShare\":true,\"shareMeta\":{\"allowCopy\":true,\"includeHiddenField\":true,\"password\":\"string\",\"includeRecords\":true,\"submit\":{\"allow\":true,\"requireLogin\":true}},\"columnMeta\":{\"property1\":{\"order\":0,\"width\":0,\"hidden\":true,\"statisticFunc\":\"count\"},\"property2\":{\"order\":0,\"width\":0,\"hidden\":true,\"statisticFunc\":\"count\"}}}],\"records\":[{\"fields\":{\"single line text\":\"text value\"}}],\"order\":0,\"fieldKeyType\":\"id\"}"

headers = {
    'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN",
    'content-type': "application/json"
}

conn.request("POST", "/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/table/", payload, headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

delete.description: Move a table to trash. The table can be restored within the retention period.

x-codeSamples.source:

  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/base/%7BbaseId%7D/table/%7BtableId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific table, including its schema, name, and configuration.

dbTableName.description: Table name in backend database. Limitation: 1-63 characters, start with letter, can only contain letters, numbers and underscore, case insensitive, cannot be duplicated with existing db table name in the base.

icon.description: The emoji icon string of the table.

lastModifiedTime.description: The last modified time of the table.

defaultViewId.description: The default view id of the table.
